The Operating System

Four tools.
One platform.
Infinite leverage.

Grand Slam Offer Builder

Stop selling sessions.
Start selling outcomes.

Our AI-powered offer builder packages your expertise into high-ticket, outcome-based programmes with a defined timeline and a results guarantee. Clients don't compare you on price — they compare you on value.

→ "The 8-Week Executive Reboot: Lose 10kg, guaranteed — or session 17 is free."

Digital Product Hub

Upload once.
Earn forever.

Host and sell your workout PDFs, nutrition guides, and paid communities directly from your TrainedBy profile. Stripe handles the payout automatically. No tech setup. Near 100% margin.

→ A 12-week hypertrophy programme at 199 AED, sold to 50 clients = 9,950 AED passive income.

What's in the box

The Dubai Trainer's
Operating System.

Everything a trainer needs to build a business that runs without them.

🎯
Grand Slam Offer Builder
AI-powered tool that packages your expertise into high-ticket, outcome-based offers with a built-in guarantee. Compete on value, not price.
→ Closes clients at 3× your current rate
📦
Digital Product Hub
Host PDFs, video courses, and paid communities. Stripe handles payouts automatically. Upload once, earn forever with near 100% margin.
→ Avg trainer earns 6,200 AED/month passively
💰
Master Affiliate Vault
Instant access to pre-negotiated 25% commissions on UAE meal prep, supplements, and apparel brands. No cold emails. No negotiations. Just activate and earn.
→ 50 clients = up to 10,000 AED/month passive
🔗
Whop Affiliate Engine
Turn your clients into a sales team. They earn 30% for every person they refer to your digital products. Your customer acquisition cost drops to zero.
→ Every client becomes a distributor

How it works

Live in under
two minutes.

No technical setup. No waiting. Your profile and operating system are live the moment you submit.

01
Create your profile
Name, specialties, and REPs number. Takes under 2 minutes. You're live immediately at trainedby.ae/yourname.
02
Build your Grand Slam Offer
Our AI walks you through packaging your services into a high-ticket, outcome-based programme with a guarantee. Takes 5 minutes.
03
Activate your passive income
Upload a digital product and activate your affiliate vault. Both start earning within 24 hours of setup.
04
Share your link everywhere
Put it in your Instagram bio, WhatsApp status, and TikTok. Every visitor sees your verified profile, your Grand Slam Offer, and your digital products.
2 min
to go live
30 day
ROI guarantee
∞
passive income

Contact us →

Before you decide

Common questions.

What is the ROI Guarantee?
If your TrainedBy Pro profile doesn't generate at least 1,000 AED in new client bookings or passive affiliate income within your first 30 days, we refund your subscription in full and give you the next month free. No questions asked.
How does the Digital Product Hub work?
Upload any file (PDF, video, Notion link) and set a price. When a client buys it, Stripe automatically routes the payment to your bank account minus our 5% platform fee. You get paid within 2 business days.
Do I need to be REPs registered?
No. You can create a profile and go live immediately. The REPs badge is added once we verify your registration number — usually within 24 hours. Non-verified profiles still get full access to Pro features.
How does the Affiliate Vault work?
We negotiate master affiliate deals with UAE brands on your behalf. You activate the brands you want, share your unique link with clients, and earn a commission on every purchase they make — automatically, every month.
Can I cancel anytime?
Yes. No contracts, no lock-in. Cancel from your dashboard and your profile reverts to the Free tier — it stays live, just without the Pro tools. Your digital products and affiliate earnings are yours to keep.
What is the trainer referral programme?
Every Pro trainer gets a unique referral link. When another trainer signs up to Pro through your link, you earn 20% of their monthly subscription — recurring, for as long as they stay. Refer 4 trainers and your Pro subscription is free forever.

Your expertise.
Your empire.
Your operating system.
